Legal

Privacy Policy

Starter policy for a small 3D print-on-demand business. This page should be reviewed and customized with the final business entity, contact details, jurisdiction, and any platform-specific requirements before launch.

Effective date: April 28, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how [Insert legal business name] collects, uses, stores, and shares personal information when you visit this website, request a quote, upload files, or contact the business about 3D printing services.

Information Collected

The business may collect the following information:

  • Name, email address, phone number, and company name if provided
  • Project notes, print requirements, and requested deadlines
  • Uploaded design files, models, drawings, photos, or measurements
  • Messages sent through quote or contact forms
  • Basic technical information such as browser type, device type, and site usage data if analytics tools are enabled

How Information Is Used

Information may be used to:

  • Respond to quote requests and customer inquiries
  • Review uploaded models and determine whether a print job is feasible
  • Recommend materials, finishes, timelines, and fulfillment options
  • Communicate about production, delivery, pickup, invoicing, or revisions
  • Improve the website and customer experience
  • Maintain records for business operations, legal compliance, and dispute resolution

Design Files And Confidentiality

Customer-uploaded design files and related project information may contain sensitive or proprietary information. The business should describe here what level of confidentiality it is willing to provide, how files are stored, who can access them, and whether separate non-disclosure agreements are available.

Placeholder for legal review: [Insert final confidentiality language and file retention policy].

Sharing Of Information

Personal information is not sold. Information may be shared only as needed with:

  • Payment processors used to complete a transaction
  • Shipping carriers used to deliver finished orders
  • Hosting, form, analytics, or email service providers used to operate the website
  • Professional advisers or authorities when legally required

Data Retention

Personal information and project files may be retained for as long as reasonably needed to respond to inquiries, complete orders, maintain business records, resolve disputes, or comply with legal obligations.

Placeholder for legal review: [Insert final retention timelines for quote requests, project files, and customer communications].

Cookies And Analytics

If analytics, advertising pixels, or cookie-based tools are added to the website, this section should be updated to explain what tools are in use, what data they collect, and how users can opt out where required by law.

Your Rights

Depending on where customers are located, they may have rights to request access to, correction of, or deletion of their personal information. They may also have rights to object to certain processing or withdraw consent where consent applies.

Requests can be directed to: [Insert privacy contact email].

Security

Reasonable safeguards should be used to protect personal information and uploaded files. However, no online transmission or storage method is guaranteed to be completely secure.

Children's Privacy

This website is not intended for children under the age of 13, and the business does not knowingly collect personal information directly from children.

Changes To This Policy

This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. The current version should always be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

Contact

For privacy questions or requests, contact: [Insert legal business name, business address, and privacy contact email].

Forgefront 3D

Fast, practical 3D printing for replacement parts, prototypes, custom jobs, and small batches. Built for customers who want clear answers and a real quote without enterprise complexity.

Replace contact details, testimonials, and gallery photos with real business assets before launch.
